incidents.incident_title: 12301 Howrah Rajdhani Express delayed 45min at Kanpur Central
incidents.situation_summary: Train running 45 minutes behind schedule due to overhead equipment malfunction at Kanpur Central.
incidents.affected_route: NEW DELHI to HOWRAH JN main line corridor.
incidents.reroute_plan: Divert 12301 via Allahabad avoided line, platform change 4→1 at Kanpur Central, estimated delay recovery 18 minutes.
incidents.operational_recommendations: Clear adjacent lines and prioritize express corridor flow.
incidents.maintenance_task: Inspect and test signaling points and local circuits at Kanpur Central station immediately.
incidents.operations_task: Execute slot re-scheduling and coordinate clearance for train 12301 on the main line.
incidents.station_manager_task: Make PA announcement: Passenger attention please, train 12301 Howrah Rajdhani Express is running late by 45 minutes.
incidents.passenger_sms: [RailMind Alert] Train 12301 Howrah Rajdhani Express is delayed by 45 minutes. Please check screens for platform updates.
